mapper.sql: id, username, password, phone, email, nickname, avatar_url, status, status_reason, locked_until, need_change_password, failed_login_attempts, last_login_time, last_login_ip, register_ip, register_device_info, register_time, invitation_code_used, api_key, tenant_id, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM usr_user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM usr_user WHERE phone = #{phone} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM usr_user WHERE email = #{email} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO usr_user (username, password, phone, email, nickname, avatar_url, status, status_reason, locked_until, need_change_password, failed_login_attempts, last_login_time, last_login_ip, register_ip, register_device_info, register_time, invitation_code_used, api_key, tenant_id, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by, deleted) VALUES
(#{item.username}, #{item.password}, #{item.phone}, #{item.email}, #{item.nickname}, #{item.avatarUrl}, #{item.status}, #{item.statusReason}, #{item.lockedUntil}, #{item.needChangePassword}, #{item.failedLoginAttempts}, #{item.lastLoginTime}, #{item.lastLoginIp}, #{item.registerIp}, #{item.registerDeviceInfo}, #{item.registerTime}, #{item.invitationCodeUsed}, #{item.apiKey}, #{item.tenantId}, #{item.createdAt}, #{item.updatedAt}, #{item.createdBy}, #{item.updatedBy}, #{item.deleted})
